section.heading: Payments into reclamation fund of moneys received from entrymen and water right applicants

content.p: All moneys received from entrymen or applicants for water rights shall be paid into the reclamation fund.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section is comprised of fourth sentence of section 5 of act June 17, 1902. First, second and fifth sentences of such section 5 were classified to sections 439, 431 and 381 of this title, respectively; part of third sentence was classified to section 476 of this title.

note.heading: Section as Unaffected by Submerged Lands Act
note.p: Provisions of this section as not amended, modified or repealed by the Submerged Lands Act, see section 1303 of this title.
